news.headline: As energy prices soar, Russia emerges as major winner of Middle East war
news.summary: Russia has so far been the only winner from the war in the Middle East as energy prices soar and attention for its war against Ukraine has faded, EU Council President Antonio Costa has said. Late on Monday, US President Donald Trump and Russian counterpart Vladimir Putin discussed the war amid repor

news.headline: Iran vows to fight 'as long as needed' as Trump says war will end 'soon'
news.summary: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said Tuesday his country would keep fighting as long as necessary, casting doubt on US President Donald Trump's insistence that the conflict would be over "soon."

news.headline: Hegseth vows most intense day yet of US strikes as Iran aims to fight on
news.summary: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said Tuesday will be the most intense day yet of US strikes inside Iran as the Islamic Republic, its firepower diminished, vowed to fight on. news.headline: Russia, Ukraine both claim frontline success while US-led talks remain on hold
news.summary:
Russian and Ukrainian officials are making contradictory claims of battlefield successes in their four-year-old war, with Ukraine saying it has pushed Moscow’s forces back in some places on the front line but the Kremlin insisting that Russia’s invasion of its neighbour is making progress.

news.headline: The Louvre heist: Security flaws and deeper cracks at France’s top museum
news.summary: An emblematic monument of French culture, the Louvre Museum embodies nearly 9,000 years of history and houses more than 600,000 works of art across over 70,000 square metres of gallery space.
